notes: Iteration 28: Strong formal verification signal — SkillFortify (abstract interpretation, SAT-based dependency resolution, ASBOM) and AgentVerify (LTL model checking, 23 specification templates) represent paradigm shift from heuristic scanning to formal mathematical guarantees. SSL representation (Peking University) demonstrates structured skill representations improve discovery (+23.4% MRR) and risk assessment (+5.8% F1). Ecosystem report quantifies quality gap (6.2/12 avg) and security gap (36% prompt injection). 5 new raw sources. Daily digest + metadata updated.
